title: Claude Code just Changed Website Design Forever
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates Claude Code for building client websites with an integrated CMS that allows non-technical clients to edit content without breaking the site. The workflow integrates Claude with design references, Firecrawl for data extraction, MongoDB for backend storage, and Vercel for hosting.
